session:
version: 0.3.10
name: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-certificates
predecessor: null
secrets:
- name: MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-backup
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-dba-policy
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan
  kind: binary
  size: 20
- name: REPLICATION_USER_PASSWORD
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: binary
  size: 20
- name: MAXSCALE_SCONE_INJECTED_ADMIN_PASSWORD
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: binary
  size: 20
- name: MARIADB_CA_KEY
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-backup
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-dba-policy
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/scone-osv-scan
  kind: x509-ca
  private_key: MARIADB_CA_KEY
  common_name: MariaDB_CA
- name: maxscale-frontend-key
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: maxscale-frontend-cert
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: x509
  private_key: maxscale-frontend-key
  common_name: maxscale
  issuer: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  dns:
  - maxscale
  - mariadb
  - osv-scanner-sample-maxscale-service
- name: maxscale-internal-key
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: maxscale-internal-cert
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-maxscale
  kind: x509
  private_key: maxscale-internal-key
  common_name: maxscale
  issuer: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  dns:
  - maxscale-internal
- name: mariadb-key
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: mariadb
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  kind: x509
  private_key: mariadb-key
  common_name: mysqld
  issuer: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  dns:
  - mysqld
  - osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-primary-service
  - osv-scanner-sample-mariadb-replica-service
  - localhost
- name: backup-key
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-backup
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: backup-cert
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-backup
  kind: x509
  private_key: backup-key
  common_name: mariadb-backup
  issuer: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  dns:
  - mariadb-backup
- name: setupClientKey
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-dba-policy
  kind: private-key
  migrate: true
- name: setupClientCert
  export:
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-primary
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-replica
  - session: osv-scanner-sample2/mariadb-dba-policy
  kind: x509
  private_key: setupClientKey
  common_name: setup-client
  issuer: MARIADB_CA_CERT
  dns:
  - setup-client
access_policy:
  read:
  - ANY
  update:
  - CREATOR
creator:
  signer: |
    -----BEGIN PUBLIC KEY-----
    MCowBQYDK2VwAyEAcKtAFLOMRitgqlXJgLRvctwmDlY+xowL6ed9nQDHbc8=
    -----END PUBLIC KEY-----
